approval_scope: Approved within the refreshed tested dashboard scope: visual inspection of the 44 commit-bound screenshots; automated keyboard, focus, axe, semantic, responsive-overflow, provenance and prohibited-content checks across the declared browser matrix. This approval is not a universal accessibility or WCAG-conformance claim. An independent manual VoiceOver session was not performed.
findings: The refreshed full browser matrix passed 64 of 64 tests across Chromium desktop and mobile, Firefox and WebKit for the strengthened complete-public-payload review contract.
The home hero word-fragmentation finding was remediated before this packet and is protected by a browser assertion.
No clipping, page-level horizontal overflow, restricted raw content, secret-like values or provenance mismatch remained in the 44 reviewed screenshots and machine-readable packet.
Every displayed aggregate readiness value and the complete blocker projection matched the regenerated provenance records.
Independent manual VoiceOver testing was not performed and is excluded from this bounded approval.
remediation_or_waiver: No unresolved automated, visual or provenance finding remains in the refreshed packet. Manual VoiceOver remains an explicitly documented scope limitation rather than a claim of conformance.

assistive_technology: Playwright keyboard and semantic accessibility assertions
